## VRCX-Luo 2026.6.16

This is the first formal 2026.6.16 build of VRCX-Luo. It focuses on the recent VRCX-Luo quality-of-life updates, friend tracking reliability, and UI fixes.

### Highlights

- Added profile bio diff display in the user information card, enabled by default for archived bio changes.
- Improved bio archive comparison so archive entries compare against the previous archive snapshot.
- Restored and stabilized auto follow behavior so tracking can continue when the target leaves and later rejoins.
- Fixed the status bar zoom value so Ctrl + mouse wheel updates the displayed zoom percentage immediately.
- Fixed the user card instance action tooltip drifting to the top-left after clicking "Open in VRChat".
- Kept the instance action button stable while the in-game open request is running, preventing duplicate requests without breaking hover positioning.

### Notes

- This project is a fork maintained with AI-assisted updates for VRCX-Luo-specific changes.
- The release assets are built automatically by GitHub Actions from the `2026.6.16` tag.
